the screen door latch is sticking again and im not slamming that thing all summer just because nobody wants to replace a ten dollar part
if you go out can you check whether the gate latch actually caught this time bc the dog got out once already and im not doing neighborhood apologies again
the guy said he fixed the latch but all he really did was close it harder so now it works in the same way punching a printer is technically troubleshooting
package was hooked over the porch latch for some reason which would be thoughtful if the box hadnt then fallen directly into the wet spot by the steps
dont let the kids mess with the shed latch again bc last time it jammed halfway and then suddenly i was outside with a butter knife doing amateur lock science
the bathroom latch doesnt catch unless you lift the door a little first which is a very cool system if your goal is keeping privacy available only to the coordinated
he said he couldnt get in because the latch on the fence was weird which i believe only because that latch has been weird since the first week we lived here
if youre already at the hardware store can you grab whatever makes a latch stop doing that loose rattly thing in the wind bc i am hearing it in my sleep now
the gate latch by the side yard is open again and unless raccoons have learned basic mechanics i have some follow up questions for this household
maintenance note says adjusted latch alignment and somehow that sentence still describes a door that will not stay shut unless you threaten it personally
the old cooler still works but the latch pops open if you pick it up wrong so just know that before you trust it with drinks and your last remaining optimism
someone hung the sign off the latch and now every time the door opens it bangs into the frame like a tiny metal announcement that nobody needed
if they say meet by the back gate just know the latch is half broken and you have to lift and push at the same time like youre entering a bad secret
the hatch latch on the truck bed keeps flipping loose and i would like one object around here to remain confidently closed for more than six minutes
dont shut the pantry too hard or the latch gets weird and then it wont open without that little shoulder move that makes me feel like im arguing with furniture
the babysitter texted that the latch on the front gate wouldnt close and i fully believe her because that latch has chosen chaos all week
the cooler latch snapped during practice and now everything smells like sports drink and melted ice which feels on brand for this season honestly
the dog learned the porch latch before certain adults in this family and i really dont know what to do with that information
if youre dropping something off just know the mailbox latch is busted so it looks closed when it isnt and thats how we keep getting damp envelopes
he said he fixed the coop latch but i watched him test it once and walk away which is less repair and more optimism with tools
the guest room window latch doesnt sit right and now i have to choose between fresh air and the feeling that something is technically unsecured
the latch on the baby gate keeps catching my sleeve and at this point i think its become personal
i know the car door closes but the latch on the passenger side sounds different now and i hate problems that arrive as a sound before a bill
someone needs to look at the latch on the trash enclosure because the wind keeps getting in there and then the whole area looks like raccoons won an election
if you hear banging its just the side gate latch again doing that thing where it almost catches and then changes its mind in public
the pool gate latch is too high for the little kids which is obviously the point but somehow also too annoying for every adult using it
he came back from the store with screws but not the latch we actually needed so now we own more hardware and the same exact problem
the screen latch is broken enough to be annoying but not broken enough that anyone else in this house sees it as today's problem
they charged a service fee to tighten the latch and im trying to be mature about that but i did watch a man use one screwdriver and then leave
if you put the bikes back in the shed make sure the latch really clicks bc yesterday one door drifted open all night and now everything in there feels damp and judged
the gate latch by the driveway only works if you lift the whole thing a little first which has become one of those house facts everybody knows and nobody fixes
the little latch on the medicine cabinet fell off again and i would love to stop discovering household failures one tiny metal piece at a time
someone left the rabbit hutch latch half done and now i get to start my morning with cardio and betrayal
the porch swing storage box has a latch but apparently only in the decorative sense because it opens every time somebody sits down too hard nearby
if youre coming over dont use the side door unless you enjoy guessing whether the latch actually caught or just made a hopeful noise
the glove compartment latch is weird now so if registration isnt in there dont panic right away it might just be hiding behind the stuck part again
the latch on the attic pull down is loose and i dislike any home feature that makes the ceiling look undecided
maintenance says the latch issue is cosmetic which is bold language for a door that keeps opening when the dryer runs
the shed latch froze last winter and never really came back emotionally even after it thawed
i put the spare key by the back latch like always but then remembered the latch itself barely exists as a concept at this point
the gate didnt stay shut because the latch was full of dirt again and honestly same i too stop functioning when enough random stuff gets packed into me
if the dog gets out one more time im replacing that latch myself bc clearly weve reached the end of the waiting for someone phase
the old suitcase still rolls fine but the latch opens if it tips even a little so travel with confidence but not too much of it
the cabinet latch under the sink keeps popping and every time it does i assume a child is in there or a plumbing bill is coming
he was outside fiddling with the latch for twenty minutes and somehow the gate is now louder and less closed than before
dont lean on the fence by the latch side bc thats apparently the weak zone and i dont need company discovering that with their full body weight
the side yard gate looks shut from inside but the latch doesnt fully catch unless you pull it back once first which is a fun surprise for anybody leaving with groceries
the chicken coop latch is now secured with a bungee cord which is not ideal but is unfortunately still an upgrade over whatever yesterday was
they said the latch was replaced but it has the exact same weird wiggle as the old one so either they found its twin or we have entered philosophical repair
if you hear me cursing outside its probably just me trying to work that stupid latch with one hand while carrying three bags and losing faith in basic design
